The retry-detection mechanism depends on an implicit cross-script invariant (verification_verdict is never cleared to null between cycles by any other script) rather than an enforced contract -- confirmed true today by re-reading advance-cockpit-state.ps1, close-out-verified-task.ps1, and return-inadequate-work.ps1, but a future script change could silently break this assumption without any test catching it until a real retry happens.
